productDisplayName: Fila Women Paramount White Casual Shoes
description: This Paramount shoe from fila are great for casual wear. They give superior traction and protection to the feet while remaining comfortable and stylish. Team these with jeans and t-shirts for a great casual look.UpperSynthetic upper with stitch detail on the toe regionPerforations on the midfoot and back foot for ventilationSynthetic overlaysCentral lace-ups for snug FitPadded tongue for comfortMesh inner for breathable comfortMidsoleShock-absorbing rubber midsole for added comfortOutsoleRubber outsole with a curved midfoot and herringbone patterned groovesShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
